content: You appear to be stuck on [Sell ALL cargo at War Citadel. You must execute sell_cargo for EVERY item type in cargo: purified_water, titanium_ore, plasma_residue, iron_ore, cobalt_ore, darksteel_ore, and any others. Sell each one sequentially. Do NOT undock. Do NOT travel. Do NOT mine. ONLY sell. After selling, cargo should be near 0/75.] in phase active for 3 minutes. Assess your current situation and either continue or abandon and replan.
